description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set within a landscaped plot, featuring a main building with a dark gable roof and brick exterior. The property includes a detached garage or outbuilding, a paved driveway, and a fenced backyard with a rectangular swimming pool. The front yard is adorned with several flowering trees and shrubs, while the backyard is lined with palm trees and a wooden deck area. The windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical pattern along the main facade, and the entrance is marked by a small porch. The surrounding grounds are covered with green grass and bordered by a sidewalk and road, creating a suburban residential setting.
description: A brick bungalow with a dark gable roof, landscaped gardens, a pool, and a detached garage, set in a suburban lot with paved driveways and flowering trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, driveway, and landscaped front yard with flowering trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and dense vegetation along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, palm trees, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, wooden deck, and the rear entrance of the bungalow.
